---
title: "Auctions"
short-title: "Auctions"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Single and multi-unit auctions, revenue equivalence, generalized second-price auctions, and R simulations."
keywords: ["auctions", "revenue equivalence", "GSP", "Vickrey", "simulation"]
---

# Auctions {#sec-auctions}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
